control_awareness: Control P2P-C-001 requires department_head approval for amounts >= 1,000,000. P2P-C-002 prevents requester self-approval. P2P-C-003 requires approval before PO issuance.
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed for department_head approval before proceeding to PO creation, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given no quarter-end pressure and a single operational need, a single consolidated purchase request for the full amount is appropriate and complies with all relevant controls and operational guidelines.
reason: The purchase need amount is above the 1,000,000 threshold, so department_head approval is required. Creating one consolidated purchase request with the full amount follows standard procedure and the preference for a clear consolidated request.
